description: Yi He, co-founder of Binance, shares her journey and experiences at the Binance 5 Year Anniversary event. She discusses her challenges with English, her dedication to Binance, and the importance of making informed decisions in the crypto space. She emphasizes hard work and continuous learning as keys to success.
topic_summary: Yi He reflects on her personal and professional growth, her role at Binance, and the significance of perseverance and research in the cryptocurrency industry. She also highlights her commitment to customer service and the Binance community [t=3:92].
